background: A filling station is supplied with gasoline once a week. If its weekly volume of sales in thousands of gallons is a random variable with probability density function $$f(x)= \begin{cases}\frac{3}{2}\left(1-x^2\right) & 0 \leq x \leq 1 \\ 0 & \text { otherwise }\end{cases}$$.

task.query: What need the capacity of the tank be so that the probability of the supplies being completely used up in a given week is no more than 0.05? Show your work.
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

task.query: What is the expected volume of sales in a given week? Show your work.

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
